mapper.sql: id, name, goods_id, collection_name AS collection, rarity, category_key, quality_label, min_float, max_float, price, image_url, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM catalog_skin ORDER BY collection_name ASC, rarity ASC, name ASC
SELECT FROM catalog_skin WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM catalog_skin WHERE goods_id IS NOT NULL AND goods_id <> ''
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR goods_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR collection_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY price DESC, name ASC
ORDER BY updated_at DESC, price DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT goods_id FROM catalog_skin WHERE goods_id IS NOT NULL AND goods_id <> ''
SELECT goods_id FROM catalog_skin WHERE goods_id IS NOT NULL AND goods_id <> '' AND updated_at >= #{freshAfterTimestamp}

SELECT MIN(goods_id) AS anchor, MAX(collection_name) AS collection_name FROM catalog_skin WHERE goods_id IS NOT NULL AND goods_id <> '' AND name NOT LIKE '%纪念品%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Souvenir%' GROUP BY REGEXP_REPLACE(name, ' \\([^)]*\\)$', '') HAVING COUNT(*) < 5 AND MAX(updated_at) < #{freshAfterTimestamp} ORDER BY MAX(updated_at) ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO catalog_skin ( name, goods_id, collection_name, rarity, category_key, quality_label, min_float, max_float, price, image_url, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.name}, #{item.goodsId}, #{item.collection}, #{item.rarity}, #{item.categoryKey}, #{item.qualityLabel}, #{item.minFloat}, #{item.maxFloat}, #{item.price}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), goods_id = VALUES(goods_id), collection_name = VALUES(collection_name), rarity = VALUES(rarity), category_key = VALUES(category_key), quality_label = VALUES(quality_label), min_float = VALUES(min_float), max_float = VALUES(max_float), price = VALUES(price), image_url = COALESCE(VALUES(image_url), image_url), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT name, collection_name AS collection FROM catalog_skin WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND collection_name IS NOT NULL
